Connect.Message: Connect to the world of decentralized applications and finance.

Decentralized.Message: Gives you full control over your digital assets and allows you to interact with dApps.

Secure.Message: Using advanced security protocols to protect your digital assets and personal information.

ImportWallet.Title: Import Existing Wallet
ImportWallet.Subtitle: Restore your wallet from a seed phrase or private key
ImportWallet.PhrasePlaceholder: Paste your 12 or 24 word seed phrase here...
ImportWallet.PrivateKeyPlaceholder: Paste your private key (64 hex chars)...

CreateWallet.Title: Create New Wallet
CreateWallet.PhraseHint: Write these words down in order and keep them somewhere safe. Anyone with this phrase can access your wallet.
CreateWallet.Saved: I have written down my recovery phrase
CreateWallet.Name: Wallet Name
CreateWallet.Agreement: I agree to the terms and conditions
